vision_report.narrative_description: The audit began with a clear view of the desk biome, showing four pots with moist soil and a white rabbit anchor. However, the sequence terminates in a complete visual blackout, preventing any assessment of the plants' current state. The transition from visible to black suggests either a hardware failure or an extreme change in lighting conditions.
